title: A Single Approached Value Is Required
text: A limit exists only when the outputs settle toward one real number.

title: Use a Local Sketch Near the Point
text: Make a small sketch near $$x=0$$ and focus only on the nearby behavior. The graph keeps bouncing between heights instead of approaching one value.

title: Oscillation Near the Input
text: Because the outputs keep oscillating near $$x=0$$, $$they$$ $$do$$ $$not$$ $$settle$$ $$to$$ $$one$$ $$value$$.
